title: PressRelease
description: A Queens County District Attorney press release, statement, or announcement — the dominant object on queensda.org (1,216 posts in the 'press-releases' category, plus 'statements' and 'announcements'). Today these exist only as WordPress HTML narrative, surfaced through the accidental wp-json/wp/v2 REST API with no designed contract. This schema is the structured resource that prose should resolve to.

kind.description: Which content category this release is (WordPress category).

stage.description: Prosecution-lifecycle stage implied by the release, reverse-engineered from the arraignments/charges/indictments/court-cases WordPress categories.
